name: Capco Style
instruction: Use the capco-slides skill. Teal accents, Century Gothic typography, high-density content grids.

name: Consulting Classic
instruction: Use the consulting-pptx skill. Visualization-heavy, framework diagrams, McKinsey style.

name: Minimal Clean
instruction: Minimalist design. Lots of whitespace, clean typography, max 3 bullet points per slide.

name: Data-Driven
instruction: Focus on charts, tables, and data visualizations. Every slide needs a quantitative statement.

name: Executive Summary
instruction: Max 10 slides. Each slide has a clear key message as the title. Appendix for details.
